title: zingiberaceae
intro: The Zingiberaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the ginger family. This family consists of approximately 55 genera and over 1,600 species of plants, many of which are native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. Zingiberaceae plants are characterized by their distinctive inflorescences, which often resemble a spike or a cone, and are known for their aromatic and edible properties. Examples of plants within this family include ginger, turmeric, and cardamom, which are widely used in culinary and traditional medicine practices.
